Class ProgVarReplacer

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.ProgVarReplacer
public final class ProgVarReplacer extends Object
Replaces program variables.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ProgVarReplacer(Map<LocationVariable, LocationVariable> map, Services services)
    creates a ProgVarReplacer that replaces program variables as specified by the map parameter
